endpoints.name: GET /countries
endpoints.description: This request returns the countries supported by the Dealer API

endpoints.name: GET /dealers
endpoints.description: This request returns dealers (dealer, garage, retailer, etc.) for given parameters

endpoints.name: GET /dealers/{dealerId}
endpoints.description: This request returns dealers for given parameters
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{DEALERID}} with a real dealerid.
